TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr_mikon_Kuatu
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: nuten mikon mikon ia er aranaicuku na Nʉ'ʉvana mosa na Tanganua kanakana'uamaku Miciku rovʉvʉ.
S.PHON: nuten mikon mikon ia er~ɾ ar~ɾanaiʦuku na nɨʔɨvana mosa na taŋanua kanakanaʔuamaku miʦiku r~ɾovɨvɨ.
S.FORM: nuten mikon mikon ia er aranaicuku na Nʉ'ʉvana mosa na Tanganua kanakana'uamaku Miciku rovʉvʉ.
S.PHON: nuten mikon mikon ia er~ɾ ar~ɾanaiʦuku na nɨʔɨvana mosa na taŋanua kanakanaʔuamaku miʦiku r~ɾovɨvɨ.
S.TRANSL: 若要米貢的時候,我就從瑪雅里去達卡努瓦里去拜訪我姊姊Miciku.
During the rice ceremony, I went from NU'Uvana to Tanganua to visit my older sister Miciku.

S.FORM: a tekia matipa 'inia putukikio tia kamanʉng pepe er cunuku tipi.
S.PHON: a tekia matipa ʔinia putukikio tia kamanɨŋ pepe er~ɾ ʦunuku tipi.
S.FORM: a tekia matipa 'inia putukikio tia kamanʉng pepe er cunuku tipi.
S.PHON: a tekia matipa ʔinia putukikio tia kamanɨŋ pepe er~ɾ ʦunuku tipi.

TRANSL.notes: 我要參加她(們)的工作,要做pepe、cunuku和tipi.

S.TRANSL: 我要參加她 的工作,要做pepe、cunuku和tipi.

TRANSL.notes: I had to take part in her (their) work, and had to do pepe, cunuku and tipi.

S.TRANSL: I had to take part in her work, and had to do pepe, cunuku and tipi.

S.FORM: tekia er po'ocipi camai nen tia camai nukakia po'ocipi camai.
S.PHON: tekia er~ɾ poʔoʦipi ʦamai nen tia ʦamai nukakia poʔoʦipi ʦamai.
S.FORM: tekia er po'ocipi camai nen tia camai nukakia po'ocipi camai.
S.PHON: tekia er~ɾ poʔoʦipi ʦamai nen tia ʦamai nukakia poʔoʦipi ʦamai.
S.TRANSL: 我要煮菜,如果我們不煮菜的話,要有什麼菜?
I had to cook dishes; what dishes would there be if we didn't cook dishes?

S.FORM: er tia 'una auu tia 'una er nengʉra camai masii er mamanʉngkia nuu kumakʉnʉkia.
S.PHON: er~ɾ tia ʔuna auu tia ʔuna er~ɾ neŋɨr~ɾa ʦamai masii er~ɾ mamanɨŋkia nuu kumakɨnɨkia.
S.FORM: er tia 'una auu tia 'una er nengʉra camai masii er mamanʉngkia nuu kumakʉnʉkia.
S.PHON: er~ɾ tia ʔuna auu tia ʔuna er~ɾ neŋɨr~ɾa ʦamai masii er~ɾ mamanɨŋkia nuu kumakɨnɨkia.

TRANSL.notes: 要有湯,要有炒過的菜,當我(們)在吃的時候,才會很好(很愉快).

S.TRANSL: 要有湯,要有炒過的菜,當我 在吃的時候,才會很好 .
There had to be soup and fried dishes, so that we would be happy when we were eating.

S.FORM: er kumakʉnʉkia er makasuacu er matacuvucuvuncu ha cau er tia kaisisi.
S.PHON: er~ɾ kumakɨnɨkia er~ɾ makasuaʦu er~ɾ mataʦuvuʦuvunʦu ha ʦau er~ɾ tia kaisisi.
S.FORM: er kumakʉnʉkia er makasuacu er matacuvucuvuncu ha cau er tia kaisisi.
S.PHON: er~ɾ kumakɨnɨkia er~ɾ makasuaʦu er~ɾ mataʦuvuʦuvunʦu ha ʦau er~ɾ tia kaisisi.
S.TRANSL: 我們就那樣吃著,人們聚在一塊要祭祀.
We kept eating in that way, and people gathered together to worship.

W.TRANSL: 聚在一起-重疊-聚在一起=語助詞

S.FORM: a aranaiku Nʉ'ʉvana ia matikurucikia tikuru Kanakanavu tia matʉtʉa ha tikuru Kanakanavu masii mamanUng cU'UrUn.
S.PHON: a ar~ɾanaiku nɨʔɨvana ia matikur~ɾuʦikia tikur~ɾu kanakanavu tia matɨtɨa ha tikur~ɾu kanakanavu masii mamanuŋ ʦuʔur~ɾun.
S.FORM: a aranaiku Nʉ'ʉvana ia matikurucikia tikuru Kanakanavu tia matʉtʉa ha tikuru Kanakanavu masii mamanUng cU'UrUn.
S.PHON: a ar~ɾanaiku nɨʔɨvana ia matikur~ɾuʦikia tikur~ɾu kanakanavu tia matɨtɨa ha tikur~ɾu kanakanavu masii mamanuŋ ʦuʔur~ɾun.
S.TRANSL: 我從瑪雅里的時候,我就穿著Kanakanavu的衣服;要穿同樣是Kanakanavu的衣服,才會很好看.

TRANSL.notes: I kept wearing the Kanakanavu clothes from NU'Uvana; (we) had to wear the Kanakanavu clothes samely so that (we) looked good.

S.TRANSL: I kept wearing the Kanakanavu clothes from NU'Uvana; had to wear the Kanakanavu clothes samely so that looked good.

W.TRANSL: 主焦-衣服=改變狀態=1SG.主格

S.FORM: matacuvucuvuuncikia nia na Tanganua er UtUmUkUmUkUn cau.
S.PHON: mataʦuvuʦuvuunʦikia nia na taŋanua er~ɾ utumukumukun ʦau.
S.FORM: matacuvucuvuuncikia nia na Tanganua er UtUmUkUmUkUn cau.
S.PHON: mataʦuvuʦuvuunʦikia nia na taŋanua er~ɾ utumukumukun ʦau.
S.TRANSL: 我們就在達卡努瓦里那裡聚在一起;人們聚在一起.

TRANSL.notes: I (We) gathered together there in Tanganua; people gathered together.

S.TRANSL: I gathered together there in Tanganua; people gathered together.

W.TRANSL: 聚在一起-重疊-聚在一起=語助詞=1SG.主格

S.FORM: paracan er pa paracan er makasuacu kumakʉn matirupangʉciparacan ia te er makasicu cau tu tecikia kumakʉn.
S.PHON: par~ɾaʦan er~ɾ pa par~ɾaʦan er~ɾ makasuaʦu kumakɨn matir~ɾupaŋɨʦipar~ɾaʦan ia te er~ɾ makasiʦu ʦau tu teʦikia kumakɨn.
S.FORM: paracan er pa paracan er makasuacu kumakʉn matirupangʉciparacan ia te er makasicu cau tu tecikia kumakʉn.
S.PHON: par~ɾaʦan er~ɾ pa par~ɾaʦan er~ɾ makasuaʦu kumakɨn matir~ɾupaŋɨʦipar~ɾaʦan ia te er~ɾ makasiʦu ʦau tu teʦikia kumakɨn.

TRANSL.notes: (大家)就這樣唱著、吃著;唱完歌之後,人們就說著:「我們要吃了.」

S.TRANSL: 就這樣唱著、吃著;唱完歌之後,人們就說著:「我們要吃了.」
Every one kept singing and eating in that way; after finishing singing, people said: "we are going to eat."

W.TRANSL: 主焦-完成=語助詞=唱.主焦

S.FORM: kʉmʉʉnacu kavangvang er matacuvucuvuun.
S.PHON: kɨmɨɨnaʦu kavaŋvaŋ er~ɾ mataʦuvuʦuvuun.
S.FORM: kʉmʉʉnacu kavangvang er matacuvucuvuun.
S.PHON: kɨmɨɨnaʦu kavaŋvaŋ er~ɾ mataʦuvuʦuvuun.
S.TRANSL: 「大家聚在一起吃吧!」
"Everyone, gather together to eat!"

W.TRANSL: 吃<主焦>吃-主焦.祈使=語助詞
聚在一起-重疊-聚在一起

S.FORM: noo nikʉmʉʉncikia ia er tecikia er simasima'ʉ ʉtʉmʉkʉmʉkʉn kinvavara kinturaturanga.
S.PHON: noo nikɨmɨɨnʦikia ia er~ɾ teʦikia er~ɾ simasimaʔɨ ɨtɨmɨkɨmɨkɨn kinvavar~ɾa kintur~ɾatur~ɾaŋa.
S.FORM: noo nikʉmʉʉncikia ia er tecikia er simasima'ʉ ʉtʉmʉkʉmʉkʉn kinvavara kinturaturanga.
S.PHON: noo nikɨmɨɨnʦikia ia er~ɾ teʦikia er~ɾ simasimaʔɨ ɨtɨmɨkɨmɨkɨn kinvavar~ɾa kintur~ɾatur~ɾaŋa.
S.TRANSL: 當我們吃過以後,我們兄弟姊妹、堂表兄弟姊妹要一起玩耍.

TRANSL.notes: After I (we) ate, we siblings and cousins wanted to gether together to play.

S.TRANSL: After I ate, we siblings and cousins wanted to gether together to play.

W.TRANSL: 完成-吃<主焦>吃=語助詞=1SG.主格
關係-重疊-堂表兄弟姊妹

S.FORM: mamarurang maman mon nia kangvang ʉtʉmʉkʉmʉkʉn sumasima'ʉ jiuzheyang.
S.PHON: mamar~ɾur~ɾaŋ maman mon nia kaŋvaŋ ɨtɨmɨkɨmɨkɨn sumasimaʔɨ jiu*hejaŋ.
S.FORM: mamarurang maman mon nia kangvang ʉtʉmʉkʉmʉkʉn sumasima'ʉ jiuzheyang.
S.PHON: mamar~ɾur~ɾaŋ maman mon nia kaŋvaŋ ɨtɨmɨkɨmɨkɨn sumasimaʔɨ jiu*hejaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 年長的年幼的都在那裡聚在一起,就這樣.
The elderly and the youngsters were there to gather together, this was just so.
